sys_properties.description:
Tanium Module API Endpoint

The URL or IP Address of your Tanium Server (including HTTPS) including the API path prefix (e.g. "/plugin/products"). When this property is used for an API call, the module name, API version, and API method name will be appended automatically (e.g. "/deploy/v1/api_method_name" for Deploy).

Example: https://10.0.1.255/plugin/products
Note: If using Tanium Cloud/"TaaS", the API url should have "-api" appended to the end of the subdomain. For example, if your instance URL is https://cloud-example.cloud.tanium.com then the API endpoint for the module APIs (this property) should be set to https://cloud-example-api.cloud.tanium.com/plugin/products
Default: (none; must be set)
sys_properties.name: x_taniu_tan_core.tanium_module_api_url
